mainEntity.name: How much does SEO cost in Edmonton?

acceptedAnswer.text: SEO costs in Edmonton vary based on your competitive landscape and goals. Our SEO Foundation package starts at $999/month for basic keyword optimization, targeting 10 keywords for small businesses. The SEO Growth Package is $2,999/month for comprehensive strategy with content optimization and link building, ideal for growing businesses targeting 25+ keywords. Enterprise SEO is $7,999/month for full-scale programs with dedicated account management. We customize pricing based on your specific market, number of target keywords, and timeline to results. Contact us for a free SEO audit and custom quote tailored to your Edmonton business.

mainEntity.name: Why choose TML Agency for SEO in Edmonton?

acceptedAnswer.text: TML Agency brings 15+ years of SEO expertise combined with deep knowledge of the Edmonton market. We've delivered results for 500+ businesses and have specific experience with Edmonton's key industries: oil & gas, tech startups, government, construction, agriculture, healthcare, education, and logistics. Our transparent reporting, results-first methodology, and bilingual support (English/Punjabi) set us apart from generic agencies. We're based in Edmonton, not a distant agency, so we understand local business challenges and opportunities. Our Edmonton team provides face-to-face collaboration and accountability.

mainEntity.name: Do you serve businesses across Edmonton, St. Albert, Sherwood Park, and the greater Edmonton metropolitan area?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. While we have deep expertise in the Edmonton market specifically, we serve businesses throughout Edmonton, St. Albert, Sherwood Park, and the greater Edmonton metropolitan area. We also serve businesses across Alberta, including Calgary, Red Deer, and Fort McMurray. Whether you're located downtown near the Ice District, on Whyte Avenue, in the West End, or in the suburbs, our team delivers the same level of strategic insight and execution quality. We understand the unique needs of each neighbourhood and customize our SEO strategy accordingly.

mainEntity.name: How quickly will I see results from SEO in Edmonton?

acceptedAnswer.text: Timelines depend on your specific competitive landscape. For highly competitive Edmonton keywords in oil & gas or tech, expect 4-6 months to see meaningful results in rankings. Less competitive local terms can rank within 2-3 months. Paid advertising (Google Ads) shows results within days to weeks. We set realistic expectations during your initial consultation and provide regular monthly progress updates so you can track performance against industry benchmarks and your previous month's metrics.

mainEntity.name: What does TML's SEO process include?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our comprehensive SEO process includes: 1) Technical audit of your site for crawl errors, indexing issues, and site speed problems, 2) Competitive analysis of top-ranking sites in Edmonton to identify ranking opportunities, 3) Keyword research for high-intent search terms in your industry and location, 4) On-page optimization of title tags, meta descriptions, headers, and content structure, 5) Content creation targeting Edmonton-specific keywords and user intent, 6) Link building and authority development through ethical outreach, 7) Local SEO optimization for Google Business Profile and citations, and 8) Monthly reporting and strategy adjustments based on performance data. We focus on sustainable, white-hat strategies that build long-term authority.

mainEntity.name: Can you help our Edmonton business rank for local keywords?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. Local SEO is one of our core specialties. We optimize your Google Business Profile with accurate information and imagery, build citations across Edmonton business directories, manage and encourage local reviews, and create location-specific content targeting Edmonton neighbourhoods. For service-based businesses targeting keywords like 'plumber in Edmonton' or 'accountant near me', we ensure your business shows up in Google's local pack and maps results. Our local SEO strategy is particularly effective for service businesses and multi-location companies. We track local rankings and provide detailed local performance reporting.
